texto: God will save whomever He chooses to save. The Christian should proselytize not because he thinks he can change everybody
autor: he should proselytize because the Gospel being shared is the ultimate act of love: because he thinks he can love everybody.
explicacao: Orientação direta de he should proselytize because the Gospel being shared is the ultimate act of love: because he thinks he can love everybody. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “God will save whomever He chooses to save. The Christian should proselytize not because he thinks…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, criss-jami, healology, útil em momentos de mudanca e healology.
